title: Shuthalchiy #8364
definition:
Shuthalhites = see Shuthelah "freshly appointed"

 1) descendants of Shuthelah, son of Ephraim, and of his son of the
    same name
nasbUsage:
Definition: Shuthalhites = see Shuthelah "freshly appointed"

 1) descendants of Shuthelah, son of Ephraim, and of his son of the
    same name

    NASB:  desc. of Shuthelah
